message.content:
You are updating the implementation tracking file for a Zero Hour (C&C Generals) AI copilot project. Do NOT implement any code — only update the markdown tracking file.

**Task:** Update `plans/IMPLEMENTATION.md` to add new checkboxes for stratified batch sampling work.

**Context:** We are adding batch composition bias prevention to the training pipeline:
1. Plan 2 (Replay System): ReplayDatasetWriter now needs to store faction/phase metadata in HDF5
2. Plan 4 (Imitation Learning): New StratifiedBatchSampler to balance batches by faction/strategy/phase

**Changes to make:**

1. **In Phase 2 (Replay System) section**, under "Replay-to-Dataset Pipeline", add a new unchecked item:
   `- [ ] Store faction/phase metadata in HDF5 (faction, opponent_faction, map_name, game_phase)`

2. **In Phase 4 (Imitation Learning) section**, under "Training Pipeline", add two new unchecked items:
   `- [ ] StratifiedBatchSampler (group by faction, strategy_label, game_phase; max 40% per stratum)`
   `- [ ] ILTrainer uses StratifiedBatchSampler instead of random shuffle`

3. Also add `strategy_sampler.py` to any file listing if one exists in Phase 4.

**How to update:**
1. Read the file: `plans/IMPLEMENTATION.md`
2. Make the 3 changes above in the appropriate sections
3. Preserve all existing content and checkboxes

Working directory: /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/zh-copilot

After editing, commit with message: "docs: add stratified sampling checkboxes to IMPLEMENTATION.md"

content.text: I'll read the file first, then make the targeted edits.

1	# ZH-Copilot Implementation Plan

git add plans/IMPLEMENTATION.md && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
docs: add stratified sampling checkboxes to IMPLEMENTATION.md

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
Done. Here is a summary of what was changed in `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/zh-copilot/plans/IMPLEMENTATION.md`:

1. **Phase 2, Replay-to-Dataset Pipeline** — added one new unchecked item after "Store as HDF5/Parquet datasets":
   `- [ ] Store faction/phase metadata in HDF5 (faction, opponent_faction, map_name, game_phase)`

2. **Phase 4, Training Pipeline** — added two new unchecked items at the end of the sub-list:
   `- [ ] StratifiedBatchSampler (group by faction, strategy_label, game_phase; max 40% per stratum)`
   `- [ ] ILTrainer uses StratifiedBatchSampler instead of random shuffle`

3. **File listing for `strategy_sampler.py`** — no file listing exists anywhere in the document (no `.py` filenames are referenced), so this step was skipped as inapplicable.

All existing content and checkboxes were preserved. Committed as `6d1ae37`.
